```text
     1вҶ’import {
     2вҶ’  assignVars,
     3вҶ’  createGlobalTheme,
     4вҶ’  createGlobalThemeContract,
     5вҶ’  createTheme,
     6вҶ’  globalStyle,

     9вҶ’import {
    10вҶ’  articleLayout,
    11вҶ’  commentLayout,
    12вҶ’  darkColors,
    13вҶ’  lightArticleColors,
    14вҶ’  lightCommentColors,
    15вҶ’  noteLayout,
    16вҶ’} from './themes'
    17вҶ’
    18вҶ’export const vars = createGlobalThemeContract({
    19вҶ’  color: {
    20вҶ’    text: 'rc-text',
    21вҶ’    textSecondary: 'rc-text-secondary',
    22вҶ’    bg: 'rc-bg',
    23вҶ’    bgSecondary: 'rc-bg-secondary',
    24вҶ’    bgTertiary: 'rc-bg-tertiary',
    25вҶ’    border: 'rc-border',
    26вҶ’    accent: 'rc-accent',
    27вҶ’    accentLight: 'rc-accent-light',
    28вҶ’    link: 'rc-link',
    29вҶ’    codeText: 'rc-code-text',
    30вҶ’    codeBg: 'rc-code-bg',
    31вҶ’    hrBorder: 'rc-hr-border',
    32вҶ’    quoteBorder: 'rc-quote-border',
    33вҶ’    quoteBg: 'rc-quote-bg',
    34вҶ’    alertInfo: 'rc-alert-info',
    35вҶ’    alertWarning: 'rc-alert-warning',
    36вҶ’    alertTip: 'rc-alert-tip',
    37вҶ’    alertCaution: 'rc-alert-caution',
    38вҶ’    alertImportant: 'rc-alert-important',
    39вҶ’  },
    40вҶ’  spacing: {
    41вҶ’    xs: 'rc-space-xs',
    42вҶ’    sm: 'rc-space-sm',
    43вҶ’    md: 'rc-space-md',
    44вҶ’    lg: 'rc-space-lg',
    45вҶ’    xl: 'rc-space-xl',
    46вҶ’  },
    47вҶ’  typography: {
    48вҶ’    fontFamily: 'rc-font-family',
    49вҶ’    fontFamilySans: 'rc-font-family-sans',
    50вҶ’    fontFamilySerif: 'rc-font-family-serif',
    51вҶ’    fontMono: 'rc-font-mono',
    52вҶ’    fontSize2xs: 'rc-font-size-2xs',
    53вҶ’    fontSizeXs: 'rc-font-size-xs',
    54вҶ’    fontSizeSm: 'rc-font-size-sm',
    55вҶ’    fontSizeMd: 'rc-font-size-md',
    56вҶ’    fontSizeLg: 'rc-font-size-lg',
    57вҶ’    fontSizeBase: 'rc-font-size-base',
    58вҶ’    fontSizeSmall: 'rc-font-size-small',
    59вҶ’    lineHeight: 'rc-line-height',
    60вҶ’    lineHeightTight: 'rc-line-height-tight',
    61вҶ’  },
    62вҶ’  borderRadius: {
    63вҶ’    sm: 'rc-radius-sm',
    64вҶ’    md: 'rc-radius-md',
    65вҶ’    lg: 'rc-radius-lg',
    66вҶ’  },
    67вҶ’  layout: {
    68вҶ’    maxWidth: 'rc-max-width',
    69вҶ’  },
    70вҶ’})
    71вҶ’
    72вҶ’// :root default (light article)
    73вҶ’createGlobalTheme(':root', vars, {
    74вҶ’  color: lightArticleColors,
    75вҶ’  ...articleLayout,
    76вҶ’})
    77вҶ’
    78вҶ’// :root dark fallback (for elements without a variant theme class)
    79вҶ’createGlobalTheme(':root.dark', vars, {
    80вҶ’  color: darkColors,
    81вҶ’  ...articleLayout,
    82вҶ’})
    83вҶ’
    84вҶ’// Three variant theme classes (light colors only; dark handled by CSS override)
    85вҶ’export const articleTheme = createTheme(vars, {
    86вҶ’  color: lightArticleColors,
    87вҶ’  ...articleLayout,
    88вҶ’})
    89вҶ’
    90вҶ’export const noteTheme = createTheme(vars, {
    91вҶ’  color: lightArticleColors,
    92вҶ’  ...noteLayout,
    93вҶ’})
    94вҶ’
    95вҶ’export const commentTheme = createTheme(vars, {
    96вҶ’  color: lightCommentColors,
    97вҶ’  ...commentLayout,
    98вҶ’})
    99вҶ’
   100вҶ’// Dark override: ancestor .dark or [data-theme="dark"] overrides color vars
   101вҶ’const darkColorOverrides = assignVars(vars.color, darkColors)
   102вҶ’
   103вҶ’for (const themeClass of [articleTheme, noteTheme, commentTheme]) {
   104вҶ’  globalStyle(`.dark .${themeClass}, [data-theme="dark"] .${themeClass}`, {
   105вҶ’    vars: darkColorOverrides,
   106вҶ’  })
   107вҶ’  // Also handle when the theme class is on the element itself (not a descendant)
   108вҶ’  globalStyle(`.dark.${themeClass}, [data-theme="dark"].${themeClass}`, {
   109вҶ’    vars: darkColorOverrides,
   110вҶ’  })
   111вҶ’}
   112вҶ’
```

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user wants to add two more text hierarchy levels based on `textSecondary`. Looking at the pattern:

- `text` - primary text color
- `textSecondary` - secondary text color

They want to add `textTertiary` and `textQuaternary` (or similar naming).

Let me look at the zinc palette used:
- Light: text=#000, textSecondary=#18181b (zinc-900)
- Dark: text=#fafafa, textSecondary=#a1a1aa (zinc-400)

For light theme, continuing the hierarchy:
- textTertiary: #71717a (zinc-500) 


- textQuaternary: #a1a1aa (zinc-400)

I'm reconsidering the light theme hierarchy since textSecondary is already quite dark. I should map out a proper progression from pure black down through the zinc grays, picking intermediate shades for the tertiary and quaternary levels.

For the dark theme, I need to reverse the logicвҖ”textSecondary should be lighter than the primary text, then step down to even lighter grays for tertiary and quaternary. Now I need to update the CSS variables file with these new color assignments.
